response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The vocal tracks match the lyrics provided for both 'Show Them (Who You Are)' and 'All for One'. 2. JSON Usage: Followed the Indonesian and English lyrics reference to translate and transcribe both performances. 3. Timing & Pacing: Structured the timing tightly around vocal active phases, with immediate transitions to keep pace with the energetic tempo of both songs. Includes the title card visual subtitle for context.

subtitles.original: Jangan kau takut
subtitles.english: Do not be afraid,

subtitles.original: Karena pada akhirnya
subtitles.english: because in the end,

subtitles.english: everything will be alright.

subtitles.original: Arahkan pandangan mu
subtitles.english: Direct your gaze,

subtitles.english: sharp and straight ahead.

subtitles.english: hold on to what you are searching for.

subtitles.english: Scream it out!

subtitles.english: La la la la la... La la la la la...

subtitles.english: run and show them who you are!
